steps: Go to https://ably.com and log in or sign up for a free account
From the dashboard, click on the app you want to use (or create a new app with 'Create App')
Click the 'API Keys' tab within the app settings
Enter a name for the key and select the capabilities you need (publish, subscribe, presence, history, push, stats)
Click 'Create key' and copy the full API key string (format: AppID.KeyID:KeySecret)
Use the full key string as the Basic auth credential in the Authorization header

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Full Ably API key in the format AppID.KeyID:KeySecret, sent as a Basic auth credential in the Authorization header

notes: Free tier includes 6 million messages/month and up to 200 peak connections
The API key contains the secret portion — store and treat the full key as a secret
Each app can have multiple API keys with different capability sets
For client-side usage, use Ably Token Authentication instead of direct API keys to avoid exposing secrets
The key format AppID.KeyID:KeySecret — the portion before the colon is the public key ID, the portion after is the secret

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the current Ably server time to verify connectivity and authentication
